title: Zelensky’s Dizzying U-Turn Is the Latest Zigzag in a Presidency Full of Them
summary_full: President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine has pivoted from unpopular moves before, but a recent decision about military leadership and strategy could weaken his position.
summary_public: President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine has pivoted from unpopular moves before, but a recent decision about military leadership and strategy could weaken his position.

UA.label: negative
UA.evidence: Zelensky’s Dizzying U-Turn...could weaken his position.
